last_remarks: Visited the plant on 14th Aprl and had a discussion with the Purchase Manager. He informed that the majority of their operations are currently based on gas; however, they still have a requirement for Furnace Oil (FO)....At present, they are procuring FO from Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited. Their weekly consumption is approximately 50–80 KL, and they have a total storage capacity of 230 KL, out of which around 40 KL is currently available.....During the discussion, I introduced our company as a reliable supplier of industrial fuels, highlighting our experience since 2005. I also explained our system-driven approach, including- GPS tracking facility after dispatch Dedicated CRM support for smooth coordination.....The Purchase Manager shared a concern regarding previous issues of nozzle choking due to poor-quality FO. In response, I assured him that our product is tested and proven for consistent quality and performance.  Additionally, I offered that we can arrange a site visit by our technical engineer, who can inspect their system and provide expert guidance on the most suitable fuel and usage practices for their plant.......I also informed him that we will be sending a sample for their evaluation. After reviewing our proposal, he mentioned that he will discuss internally with management and provide feedback.  I further assured him of competitive pricing compared to their current supplier and conveyed our interest in building a long-term business relationship.
